name: step
description: Execute a workflow step within an initiative. Returns directive text, history folder path, files to read, and composed profile prompt.

step.description: Step name to execute. Built-in steps: init, specify, plan, tasks, implement, audit, clarify, complete

dir.description: Working directory containing the .brains folder. Used for profile resolution and initiative state.

initiative.description: Optional: Override the current active initiative. Path relative to history/ folder (e.g., '675d8a3f-feature-user-auth')

type.description: Required for 'init' step: Type of initiative to create

name.description: Required for 'init' step: Name/slug for the new initiative (e.g., 'user-auth')

directive.description: The step directive/instruction text for the agent

history_folder.description: Absolute path to the initiative's history folder

files_to_read.description: List of file paths the agent should read before proceeding

composed_prompt.description: Pre-composed profile prompt content for this step

errors.message: Directory does not contain a .brains folder
errors.suggestion: Run 'brains init' in the project directory first
Available steps: init, specify, plan, tasks, implement, audit, clarify, complete

errors.message: No active initiative. Use 'init' step to create one or provide 'initiative' parameter
errors.suggestion: Run step='init' with type and name parameters to create a new initiative
Type must be one of: feature, bug, refactor
Check the initiative path or use 'init' to create a new one
